message: You know that friend who always seems a little too prepared for every situation? Yep, that’s me! Just the other day, I was rummaging through the closet and stumbled upon my ‘go-bag’—you know, the one filled with snacks, a flashlight, and even a deck of cards for entertainment. My family teased me at first, but during a recent storm, they were grateful for those extra snacks and the light when the power went out. It’s funny how being a bit over-prepared can turn into a lifesaver in the moment! 📦✨ Have you ever found yourself in an unexpected situation where being prepared made a difference?
